name: @sextant/conv-workflow
description: The workflow convention in TypeScript — a co-equal peer to conventions/workflow/go (ADR-0041, TASK-239). Record types + parse/marshal helpers, plus the requestWorkflowStart verb (publish a workflow.start). Passes the SAME conformance vector the Go suite passes.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/records.test.js dist/test/conformance.test.js
scripts.test:conformance: npm run build && node --test dist/test/records.test.js dist/test/conformance.test.js
